characters.name: LIISA
characters.description: Väike inimene, rõõmsameelne tüdruk. Tal on heledad pruunid juuksed kahe patsis, mis on seotud väikeste roosade lintidega. Seljas on tal erekollane kleit valgete täppidega ja valged sukad. Suured sinised silmad ja soe naeratus. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: KASPAR
characters.description: Väike inimene, uudishimulik poiss. Tal on lühikesed pruunid juuksed ja suured pruunid silmad. Seljas on tal sinine T-särk ja hallid lühikesed püksid. Tal on laial naeratus ja lahke näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: Mängutuba
locations.description: Cozy children's playroom with light blue walls, a soft green rug covering most of the wooden floor. A large window on the back wall shows a view of green trees and a bright spring sky. In the center, there's a small round wooden table with two small colorful chairs (one pink, one blue). On the left wall, there's a simple, low white bookshelf filled with colorful children's books. Warm, bright sunlight streams through the window. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Liisa and Kaspar are sitting on two small colorful chairs (Liisa on pink, Kaspar on blue) at a small round wooden table in a cozy children's playroom. They are smiling warmly at each other. The room has light blue walls, a soft green rug, and a window showing green trees. Bright sunlight streams through the window. A white bookshelf with colorful books is on the left wall. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Kaspar are at the small round wooden table in the playroom, looking towards the large window with excited expressions. Outside the window, vibrant green trees and a bright spring sky are visible. They are pointing towards the window. The room has light blue walls, a soft green rug, and a white bookshelf on the left. Bright sunlight fills the room. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Kaspar are standing next to the small round wooden table, looking thoughtfully at the empty light blue wall. Liisa is holding a stack of colorful papers. Kaspar is pointing towards the wall, indicating their idea to decorate it. The room has a soft green rug and a white bookshelf on the left. Bright sunlight streams through the window. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Kaspar are sitting back at the small round wooden table. Liisa is carefully picking out a bright green sheet of paper from a pile of colorful construction paper. Kaspar is holding a blue sheet of paper, looking at it with a smile. The table is neatly arranged. The room has light blue walls and a soft green rug. Bright sunlight fills the room. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Kaspar are engrossed in their craft at the small round wooden table. Liisa is holding child-safe scissors and carefully cutting a colorful paper shape (like a flower petal) from a pink sheet. Kaspar is cutting a yellow paper shape. Colorful paper scraps are scattered on the table. They look focused and happy. Bright sunlight fills the room. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Kaspar are assembling their paper creations at the small round wooden table. Liisa is gently applying glue from a stick onto a green paper leaf shape. Kaspar is holding a colorful paper flower and waiting to attach his leaf. Several half-finished paper spring decorations are visible on the table. They are smiling. Bright sunlight fills the room. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Kaspar are proudly holding up several completed colorful paper spring decorations (like flowers, leaves, small birds) in front of them, smiling broadly. The small round wooden table in front of them has a few remaining paper scraps. They look very happy with their creations. Bright sunlight fills the playroom. Cartoon style.

Liisa is carefully taping a colorful paper flower onto the light blue wall of the playroom. Kaspar is holding up another paper decoration, ready to be taped. The wall is starting to be decorated with their beautiful spring crafts. They are working together and smiling. Bright sunlight fills the room. Cartoon style.

The light blue wall of the playroom is now beautifully adorned with all of Liisa and Kaspar's colorful paper spring decorations (flowers, leaves, birds). Liisa and Kaspar are standing back, admiring their work with big smiles, their hands on their hips. The room looks cheerful and festive, filled with bright sunlight. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Kaspar are sitting on the soft green rug in the playroom, in front of their beautifully decorated light blue wall, which is covered with their colorful paper spring crafts. They are both smiling widely and happily, looking at the viewer. The room is bright and cheerful, illuminated by sunlight from the window. Cartoon style.
